testcase.name: YdbQdrantClient (programmatic API, mocked YDB) > forwards all client methods to service when initialized with apiKey
YdbQdrantClient (programmatic API, mocked YDB) > uses userUid as signing key when initialized with userUid only
YdbQdrantClient (programmatic API, mocked YDB) > configures the YDB driver and ensures metadata table before returning a client
YdbQdrantClient (programmatic API, mocked YDB) > rejects ambiguous identity when apiKey and userUid are both provided
YdbQdrantClient (programmatic API, mocked YDB) > rejects missing identity without throwing a TypeError when called without options
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > creates collection with raw collection and apiKey
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > passes res.locals.authUserUid as userUid into service calls
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns QdrantServiceError payload and status code on collection error
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > handles get and delete collection through service
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > invokes putCollectionIndex with raw collection and apiKey from request
collectionsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > passes different tenant-scoped userUids for the same api-key
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > upserts points via both PUT and POST aliases
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > does not call upsert service when request has already timed out
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > searches, queries and deletes points through service
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > passes different tenant-scoped userUids for the same api-key
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns QdrantServiceError payload and status for points search failures
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns 400 and payload for vector dimension mismatch on upsert
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > logs unexpected errors and returns 500 for delete points
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns 500 and schedules exit on compilation timeout during upsert (PUT)
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > still schedules exit for compilation timeout when PUT request has already timed out
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns 500 and schedules exit on compilation timeout during upsert (POST)
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > still schedules exit for compilation timeout when POST upsert alias has already timed out
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns 500 and schedules exit on compilation timeout during search
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns 500 and schedules exit on compilation timeout during query
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > retrieves points by IDs via POST /:collection/points
pointsRouter (HTTP, mocked service) > returns QdrantServiceError for retrieve points failures
utils/requestIdentity > extracts and trims api-key
utils/requestIdentity > prefers req.ip over socket.remoteAddress
utils/requestIdentity > derives user uid from api-key when present
utils/requestIdentity > falls back to anonymous ip+ua identity when api-key is absent
utils/requestIdentity > builds the same namespace uid for missing tenant and tenant=default
utils/requestIdentity > separates namespace uids for different tenant headers
utils/requestIdentity > uses api-key as signing key when present and user uid otherwise
